Now onboarding accredited investors · Reg D 506(c)

Real estate liquidity — without giving up future income or appreciation.

United Properties TRU™ is a tokenized real estate rollup. Owners can exchange a property for tokens (or elect for a combination of tokens and cash) and stay invested; investors own a fractional interest in a diversified pool of income-producing residential rentals — with rental income distributed in USDC or fiat, for verified accredited U.S. investors under Reg D 506(c).

How it works

The opportunity

A $300 trillion market, now within reach.

For decades, owners of the ~50M U.S. rental units could only sell for all-cash and walk away. United Properties unlocks a better path — for the ~20M mostly mom-and-pop owners, and for a new generation of accredited investors.

$300T+
Global real estate market
~50M
U.S. rental units (TAM)
ERC-3643
Tokenized ownership
USDC / fiat
Rental distributions
The problem

You shouldn't have to choose between liquidity and upside.

Application14–24 days
Bank approval21–32 days
Legal review28–40 days
Escrow & closing35–48 days
Weeks before capital is deployed
All-cash exits

Selling to a buyer for cash triggers taxes and commissions — and ends your future income and appreciation.

Concentration risk

A single property in a single market — all your eggs in one basket, exposed to one vacancy.

Limited liquidity

Capital locked away for years, with few options to exit before the holding period ends.

Management burden

Tenants, repairs, vacancies, and paperwork — being a landlord never really stops.

The solution

From a single property to a diversified, liquid position.

Owners exchange property for tokens; investors buy into the pool. Either way — a few elegant steps, no paperwork mountains.

01
Create account

A premium onboarding designed for serious investors.

02
Verify & accredit

KYC/KYB and accredited-investor verification via Sumsub or Persona.

03
Review the offering

Diversified-pool offering documents — LP interest or future token.

04
Subscribe & fund

Sign and fund; wire instructions released only after the company accepts.

05
Earn distributions

Rental income paid pro-rata in USDC or fiat.

Target assets

Representative of the assets we tokenize.

Illustrative of our Phase 2 pipeline — residential long-term rentals and Airbnb-style short-term / vacation rentals. Specific properties and offering terms are disclosed to verified accredited investors.

Industry data indicates short-term / vacation rentals have historically averaged roughly 8–12% annual returns. Illustrative market data only — not a projection or guarantee of United Properties TRU™ returns.

Why United Properties

Eight reasons institutions and individuals choose us.

Professionally managed

Vetted operators with institutional track records.

Diversified pool ownership

ERC-3643 tokens representing a fractional interest in a diversified pool — not one building.

Transparent records

Verifiable ownership and on-chain audit trails.

Recurring rental income

Pro-rata distributions in USDC or fiat, monthly or quarterly.

Bankruptcy-remote

Each property is held in its own isolated Series LLC.

Curated opportunities

Sourced and underwritten by our team before any raise.

Reg D 506(c) compliant

Offerings limited to verified accredited investors.

Institutional security

Compliance and controls built for the long term.

The technology behind it

Technology that makes real estate investing simpler.

We use modern infrastructure — smart contracts, secure transactions, transparent records — so that owning real estate feels as effortless as it should.

Step 1
Property

Sourced, underwritten, and placed in a Series LLC

Step 2
ERC-3643 tokens

Issued to KYC-whitelisted investor wallets

Step 3
Verification

Ownership recorded on-chain with integrity

Step 4
Investor portfolio

Reflected in your dashboard

Step 5
Distributions

Paid pro-rata in USDC or fiat

ERC-3643·Reg D 506(c)·USDC distributions·On-chain whitelisting
Security & trust

Built with the controls institutions expect.

Every layer of the platform is engineered for resilience — from identity and access, to data and assets.

Identity verification (Sumsub / Persona)
Whitelisted transfers (ERC-3643)
Encrypted infrastructure
Reg D 506(c) compliance

Modern security standards
How returns work

From the property to your portfolio.

Stage 01
Property

Generates rental cash flow

Stage 02
Platform

Aggregates by token snapshot

Stage 03
Investor wallet

Receives USDC or fiat, pro-rata

Stage 04
Portfolio growth

Compounds over time

Who it's for

Built for serious investors.

Frequently asked

Questions, answered.

Still curious? Our investor relations team is one message away.

Verified accredited U.S. investors, under Reg D 506(c). Every investor completes KYC/KYB and accredited-investor verification (via Sumsub or Persona) before investing.
You hold ERC-3643 tokens (or, today, an LP interest) representing a fractional interest in a diversified pool of individual properties — each held in its own bankruptcy-remote Series LLC — with on-chain transparency. And unlike a REIT, owners can contribute property for tokens and stay invested.
Rental income is distributed pro-rata by token snapshot, in USDC or fiat, monthly or quarterly depending on the asset.
Token transfers are restricted on-chain to KYC-whitelisted investors (ERC-3643). Peer-to-peer transfers and a compliant secondary venue are planned in later phases.
Each property is bankruptcy-remote, transfers are whitelisted on-chain, identity is verified via Sumsub or Persona, and every raise runs under Reg D 506(c).

Build your real estate portfolio with confidence.

Access regulated, tokenized real estate (ERC-3643) under Reg D 506(c), through a secure platform built for verified accredited investors.
